scripts.test:unit: tsx --test --test-concurrency=8 test/node/broken_generation.test.ts test/node/color.test.ts test/node/eraser.test.ts test/node/error_reporting.test.ts test/node/generation_performance.test.ts test/node/hexagon.test.ts test/node/large_grid.test.ts test/node/path_length.test.ts test/node/seed.test.ts test/node/serializer.test.ts test/node/symmetry.test.ts test/node/tetris.test.ts test/node/tetris_negative.test.ts test/node/triangle.test.ts test/node/ui.test.ts test/node/validator.test.ts test/node/worker_internal.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit
